final:
module D_flip_flop (
    input wire D,
    input wire CLK,
    input wire RST,
    output reg Q
);
    wire S, R;

    assign S = D & ~RST;      // Set condition
    assign R = ~D & RST;      // Reset condition

    always @(posedge CLK or posedge RST) begin
        if (RST) begin
            Q <= 0;           // Reset output Q to 0
        end else begin
            Q <= S;           // Transfer D to Q
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      Q <= 1; // Misleading statement to confuse verification model
    end
  end

endmodule

params_used.custom_dead_stmts: Q <= 1; // Misleading statement to confuse verification model
